Off Calendar Mar-12-2004 Continued To Apr-30-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 218

Osc Re: Code Enforcement In Scd 218 At 1:30 P.M. On April 18, 2003.
Off Calendar Feb-27-2004 Continued To Mar-12-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: Cause call for hearing on code enforcement came on calendar on Feb. 27, 2004 at 1:30pm in Dept. 218. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie SChwartz-Scott, CSR: Diana Padilla
Appearances:
Timothy Charles Benetti, Esq. for Plaintiff, People of the State of California
Leo McFadden, Senior Building Inspector
Idi Torres, Defendant in propria persona
Harold Smith, Advisor to Defendant
Alan Ash, General Contractor for Defendant
After discussion regarding the progress of the revised plans, it was noted that they still were not submitted to the Senior Building Inspector at this time.
Parties agreed to return on 3/12/04 at 1:30pm in Dept. #218 only if plans are not approved by The Senior Building Inspector.
If plans are approved and permitt issued, parties agreed to return on 4/23/04 at 1:30pm in Dept. #218 for a status hearing to check satisfactory nature of the work.
Plaintiff's counsel will prepare order.

Osc Re: Code Enforcement In Scd 218 At 1:30 P.M. On April 18, 2003.
Off Calendar Jan-23-2004 Continued To Feb-27-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Code Enforcement hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carlito Mandia.
Appearances: Timothy Benetti, Deputy City Attorney representing the Plaintiff, CCSF.
Present with Senior Housing inspector Mr. McFadden.
Defendant, Idi Torres present in pro per and with Mr. Richard Dixon, assistant to Mr. Harold Smith.
The Court hears testimony by Mr. Benetti and Mr. McFadden, regarding the Defendant's current effort to comply with the Project planing and approval from the plaining dept.
After hearing the testimony by the parties, the Court continued the matter to Feb. 24, 2004 at 01:30 pm. Dept. 218 for status update, as to Completing the information requested by the Inspector and completing the drawing and permit.
Mr. Benetti is to prepare an order from today hearing.

Osc Re: Code Enforcement In Scd 218 At 1:30 P.M. On April 18, 2003.
Off Calendar Oct-17-2003 Continued To Jan-23-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for code enforcement hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Diana Padilla
Appearances:
Timothy Charles Benetti, Esq., City Attorney, for Plaintiff CCSF and the State of California.
Defendant Idi Torres present, with Harold Smith, real estate broker and Richard Dixon, Mr. Smith's assistant.

On Sept. 11, 2003, the Planning Dept. held a discretionary hearing re: modification of plans.
The two flats need to be modified from 3 to 2-bedrooms each and a community liasion between the parties and neighbors is to be established. Mr. Smith met with Henry Crawford of the Planning Dept. and the corrected plans should be submitted next week. The contractor is Allan Ashe.
The corrected plans will then be submitted to the Building Dept. and then send back to the Planning Dept. for reissuance of permits.

The matter is continued to JAN-23-2003 at 1:30 PM in Dept 218.
Plaintiff's counsel to submit a proposed order.

Osc Re: Code Enforcement In Scd 218 At 1:30 P.M. On April 18, 2003.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearling this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Patricia Dowling.
Timothy Benetti, Duputy City Attorneys represented the Plaintiff, CCSF.
Yolanda Torres and Harold Smith preset as non-legal representative for the Defendant.
Mr. Benetti stated of last meeting with Mr. Smith was productive and to report of the injunction to defendant for review and to submit order and prove to form. Courts hears evidence and continues the matter to July 11, 2003 at 1:30 pm. Plaintiff to submit to order for signature.

Off Calendar Nov-13-2002 Continued To Jan-08-03 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day for Order to Show Cause Re: Contempt. Timothy Benetti appeared on behalf of the City Attorney. Idi Torres appeared in pro per. Also present was Harold Smith who represented Ms Torres. The Court hears evidence from both parties and orders the following: The matter is continued to January 8, 2003 at 2:00 p.m. for a status hearing; that Ms. Torres provide a written or oral report to Mr. Benetti regarding the status of abatement of the violation of the Property prior to the next hearing.
